attribution: Wikipedia contributors, "List of hub airports," Wikipedia revision oldid=1344170237, retrieved 2026-05-28.
modification_notice: Manual curated excerpt from the source page with modified local tiering for Cheapy global routing experiments.
notes: Tier values are Cheapy routing priorities, not Wikipedia data. Cheapy stores only selected IATA codes and local tier decisions.
